name: trace-diagnostics
purpose: Diagnose DataSwarm conversations, runs, traces, spans, tool calls, UI behavior, and execution quality regressions.
activationGuidance: Use when the user provides a conversation id, run id, trace id, or asks why an agentic execution failed.
Use before making claims about runtime behavior, tool usage, trace health, or UI/event consistency.
Prefer trace.query and include concrete remediation plus verification steps.

requires: conversation_id, run_id, trace_id, or explicit diagnostic target

finalAnswerRequirements: include concrete fix and verification recommendations

qualityChecks: call trace.query before diagnosing persisted behavior
flag mock data, empty sources, stale spans, failed tools, and false-positive evals
connect UI symptoms to run events when possible
